originalTitle: South African police officer lowered into crocodile-infested river to recover human remains
title: South African police officer lowered into crocodile-infested river to recover human remains
content: Police suspect the human remains belong to a businessman swept away by floodwater last week.

originalTitle: Three dead in suspected virus outbreak on cruise ship bound for Cape Verde
title: Three dead in suspected virus outbreak on cruise ship bound for Cape Verde
content: The World Health Organization said one case of hantavirus infection has been confirmed, with five more suspected cases under investigation.

originalTitle: Nigeria summons South African envoy over attacks on its nationals
title: Nigeria summons South African envoy over attacks on its nationals
content: There has been a wave of anti-migrant protests in South Africa, some of which have turned violent.

originalTitle: Thousands in India’s Manipur mark three years since ethnic clashes began
title: Thousands in India’s Manipur mark three years since ethnic clashes began
content: Thousands of protesters gathered in India’s Manipur state to mark three years since ethnic violence erupted.

originalTitle: Three dead in suspected hantavirus outbreak on Atlantic cruise ship
title: Three dead in suspected hantavirus outbreak on Atlantic cruise ship
content: Three of six passengers ill from a suspected rodent-transmitted virus have died, and one is in intensive care, WHO says.

originalTitle: French left-wing’s Melenchon says he will run for president in 2027
title: French left-wing’s Melenchon says he will run for president in 2027
content: Melenchon says he will make fourth bid for presidency with President Macron term-limited and Le Pen facing ban.

originalTitle: Iran says US has responded to its latest peace proposal
title: Iran says US has responded to its latest peace proposal
content: The US is yet to formally confirm it has responded. However, Trump reportedly told Israel's Kan News it was unacceptable.

originalTitle: The Iran war has strengthened Ukraine in surprising ways. Could a ceasefire with Russia be closer?
title: The Iran war has strengthened Ukraine in surprising ways. Could a ceasefire with Russia be closer?
content: President Zelensky has been visiting the Gulf to demonstrate his country's military nous.

originalTitle: A huge night for Spurs - but who are favourites to go down?
title: A huge night for Spurs - but who are favourites to go down?
content: Tottenham's 2-1 win at Aston Villa moved them out of the Premier League relegation zone - but who are now the favourites to go down?

originalTitle: Has tide turned for troubled Spurs under De Zerbi?
title: Has tide turned for troubled Spurs under De Zerbi?
content: Is Tottenham Hotspur's superb win at Aston Villa the moment the tide turned in  their fight against Premier League relegation, asks chief football writer Phil McNulty?

originalTitle: Carrick secures Champions League - what are Man Utd waiting for?
title: Carrick secures Champions League - what are Man Utd waiting for?
content: Unless Manchester United appoint Luis Enrique, it is hard to think of an acceptable alternative to giving Michael Carrick the job on a permanent basis, writes Simon Stone.
